Agentic AI Tools 2026 Tool submission workflow
Home AI Tools AI Courses Creators Admin
Supply-side funnel

Submit a tool for editorial review.

This flow exists because a serious directory needs a repeatable intake mechanism. The backend now stores incoming submissions so listings can evolve without hand-editing HTML every time.

Best fit

Tools with a clear use case, production-ready product surface, and a distinct audience or workflow position.

What helps

A precise category, honest pricing signal, and notes that explain what makes the product worth evaluating.

Tool details

Editorial process

This is a lightweight intake workflow, not an auto-approval funnel. The point is to collect structured candidate listings into backend state.

1
Structured intake

Store product, category, pricing, and contact data via the new submissions API.

2
Editorial review

Assess clarity of positioning, product maturity, and whether the tool adds signal instead of noise.

3
Directory inclusion

Approved tools can be promoted into the catalog data layer and then surfaced in featured or trending sections.

Submission workflow backed by `POST /api/submissions`.
This turns the directory into a maintainable product, not a fixed landing page.
